posts.text:
It’s pretty wild to think that for years Democrats used airports to shuttle illegals into/around this country, at times even housing them there, and now they’re holding airports and TSA agents hostage to virtual signal their support for illegals once again. 

Illegals first. Americans dead ass last.

Democrats are the party of illegal aliens. They don’t care that you’ll wait in line for hours and miss your flight. They don’t care that TSA workers (who barely make much to begin with) are going without paychecks. All they care about is appeasing the green haired lesbians who hate ICE.

Video

⬇️


Jon Levine (@LevineJonathan)

Not a SINGLE question for Mamdani at his press conference today about his wife using the N word and posting open support for Palestinian terrorism

Every reporter who was called on today should be ashamed



— https://nitter.net/LevineJonathan/status/2034687670132052107#m

Wow, that 24 billion CA spent on the homeless crisis is really going well. 

It’s time to understand that the homeless population of 2026 is not like the homeless population of previous generations. Most of these people (especially in California) are not down on their luck, they are violent offenders, who, if not for the states’s felon coddling policies, would be behind bars.


California Post (@californiapost)

Homeless squatters set fire to LA house, destroying family home next door - and kill

The Democrats DEMAND “due process” for  infinity illegals but when that “due process” is applied they still complain that it’s not fair. 

They don’t actually want “due process.” They want infinity illegals and their entire families to stay here forever, no matter what. 

Worth noting that even though the judge denied the asylum claim, the family (likely with immigration lawyers paid for by us) will appeal and end up staying here anyway. 

This is a SCAM.

Why don’t Republicans have the guts to go to the mat for the SAVE ACT? 

I know Thune says he doesn’t have the numbers, but it sure doesn’t feel like Republicans are putting up much of a fight. This is not what we sent them to DC to do. Play fight?

Discussing at 2:40 PM Eastern on @AmericaRpts

I’d note that others have been canceled for far less….and by @ABC to boot! In fact, @BachelorABC canceled former host, Chris Harrison for… Check notes…asking for compassion towards a contestant who attended an antebellum-themed party once.


Collin Rugg (@CollinRugg)

NEW: ABC's "Bachelorette" caught on camera allegedly attacking her ex-boyfriend and throwing a chair at him, which appeared to hit her child.

The "The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives" star is reportedly under investigation for domest

Democrats claim that we don’t need voter ID and proof of citizenship because voter fraud is rare, and there’s no way illegals are voting.

Well, that’s bullshit.

If illegals can (and have) steal billions of dollars meant for hospice, daycare, and other social services i’m guessing there’s a pretty damn good chance many are voting and stealing America in that way as well.

American truckers are being undercut, and you’re paying for it, both with your tax dollars and your safety. Unbelievable.

Episode 🔗 piped.video/DBimB3mPSq8
